description: Classifier results before fix (commit b9ec881). Three cases failed due to regex word boundary bugs and incorrect out-of-scope check ordering.

results.input: Who is top of the EPL table?
Show me recent Premier League results
Who leads the EPL in goals?
results.failure_reason: No pattern matched 'leads in goals' phrasing
Out-of-scope check ran after intent detection; 'who has the most' matched top_scorers before 'assists' was caught. Also \bassist\b did not match 'assists'.
